summary: Project includes booking/session functionality with WhatsApp automation for booking confirmations and launch notifications.
architectural_notes: WhatsApp automation uses wa.me deep links with pre-filled messages for booking and notification flows

existing_features.title: When a user clicks any 'Book a Session' or booking-related CTA button (e.g., in AssuredToursSection, LuminiaCapturesSection, LuminiaTechLabsSection, GSTServicesSection), open WhatsApp (wa.me) in a new tab with a pre-filled message that includes the name of the service/subsidiary selected and a prompt for the user to specify their preferred date/time. The WhatsApp number must be the same one already used in the Footer contact link.

When a user clicks the 'Notify Me' button for any upcoming brand card in ComingSoonSection (Gadgets, Moda Vestra, Velocity Vogue), open WhatsApp (wa.me) in a new tab with a pre-filled message stating that the person wants to be notified for the launch of that specific company (e.g., 'Hi, I would like to be notified about the launch of Luminia Gadgets!'). The WhatsApp number must be the same one already used in the Footer contact link.

new_feature_requests.summary: When user clicks 'Book a Session' or similar booking button, automatically open WhatsApp with a pre-filled message containing what was selected and when
When user clicks 'Notify' for a company launch, automatically open WhatsApp with a pre-filled message stating the person wants to be notified for that company's launch
